[[General/Legends|General]] '''Yeel''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[New Republic Army]]. He owed his position to [[Sien Sovv]]. He fought at the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|defense of Coruscant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
